diagrams.title: CNN Architecture Overview
diagrams.description: Standard CNN architecture showing flow from input through convolutional and pooling layers to fully connected output
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete pipeline of CNN for image classification

diagrams.title: Convolution Operation
diagrams.description: Visualizing how a 3x3 kernel slides over a 5x5 input to produce a 3x3 feature map
elements: Dot product calculation at each step
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the mathematical operation of convolution and how features are extracted

diagrams.title: Pooling Operation
diagrams.description: Demonstrating max pooling and average pooling on a 4x4 input with 2x2 pool size and stride 2
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how pooling reduces spatial dimensions while retaining important features
